Code fragment: public final TableField<UserRecord, String> EMAIL = createField(DSL.name("Email"), SQLDataType.VARCHAR(90).defaultValue(DSL.field("''", SQLDataType.VARCHAR)), this, "");

Code fragment: List<GameplayRecord> gamePlays = dslContext.selectFrom(Tables.GAMEPLAY)
Explanation: Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the GAMEPLAY table, which may retrieve unnecessary data and impact performance. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed (e.g., id, autoregister, startplaydate, endplaydate, groupdescription).

Code fragment: UserRecord codeUser = dslContext.selectFrom(Tables.USER).where(Tables.USER.USERCODE.eq(code)).fetchAny();
